title: Custom Cursor
description: Allows you to change in-game cursor
body:
# Custom Cursor 
This allows you to personalize your mouse icon to suit your style. 
You can configure click location, size, rotation, mirrorring.
You can either add cursors to cursor folder, or [access any texture](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Resource_location#Pack_contents) from minecraft/any installed mod/resourcepack

On Minecraft versions >= 1.21.9 you can use dynamic cursor feature that allows you to have different cursor depending on context

Configuration screen
![1.21.9+ config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56536e6bd72e7be6d267025cf89ba623406f7177_0.webp)


## Compatibility warning
Even though mod provides builds for all minecraft versions since 1.21.1 only versions on list below are tested:
```1.20.1, 1.20.4, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.8, latest mc version```

List may be adjusted in future based on statistics.
Please report on github or discord if you found any issue
